summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations, merges, closures, labels, or fix PRs are planned because instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled. Security-sensitive #68527 is routed only to central security triage; maintainer/draft/green-ready or bot-blocked PRs are scoped to item-level needs_human decisions.
